title: Hinckley: Stockwell House
body: "Office address and contact details  First FloorPhase 1 Stockwell HouseNew BuildingsHinckleyLeicestershireLE10 1HW   See map  Office phone number: 01165 029 140  Opening times  Monday, 9am to 5pm Tuesday, closed Wednesday, closed Thursday, closed Friday, 9am to 5pm* Saturday, closed Sunday, closed Bank holidays, closed   *open till 7pm, by appointment only  Getting here Find this probation contact centre, on a map  Walking  7-minute walk from Hinckley train station   To plan your journey by public transport Please use Cross Country Trains to plan your journey.  Parking  no visitor parking available local car parking available assistance dogs are welcome have baby changing facilities   Accessibility facilities  disabled access and disabled toilet public lift available   Court Buildings Find a court or tribunal building.  Local approved premises See the list of approved premises in your area.  Problems and complaints If you have any problems or complaints contact the office directly. You can also report any problems with this page at this address CustomerServices.rrp@justice.gov.uk.  If you can’t resolve the problem directly, you can make a complaint to HM Prison and Probation Service. "
